body_txt: A comedy trope, in which a character buys, sells, or consumes food products that expired a comically long time ago, years, decades, or even centuries in the past. It may have come from the fridge . For the horrible consequences that usually follow, see The Food Poisoning Incident , though some people avoid food poisoning incidents by employing Unconventional Food Usage and using it for non-eating purposes. Contrast Indestructible Edible and Inexplicably Preserved Dungeon Meat .
